SpaceSuit.title: Space suit
SpaceSuit.description: Part of an EVA suit used to perform orbital extra-vehicular activity, a helmet is also needed for full functionality. These suits have built in rebreathers which clean any waste gasses. Extremely uncomfortable to sleep in.

JumpSuit.title: Overalls
JumpSuit.description: Clothing that covers the top and bottom half of the body.

FlakVest.title: Ballistic vest
FlakVest.description: Designed to reduce the impact of bullets.

DusterJacket.title: Duster jacket
DusterJacket.description: A jacket that covers the whole body.

Jeans.title: Jeans
Jeans.description: Comfortable clothing that covers the lower half of the body.

Shirt.title: Shirt
Shirt.description: Comfortable clothing that cover the upper half of the body.
